title: Open the app shell after granting workspace access
description: This verifies that a first-run user can choose a workspace folder and land in the role-filtered app shell after login.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in with managed user credentials
Choose a workspace folder
Verify the app shell is visible
Verify the role-filtered navigation is displayed

title: Process and normalize a monthly population workbook
description: This verifies that an admin can complete workbook processing and reach the normalized population review stage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data import area
Upload a valid monthly risk or BI workbook
Process the imported workbook
Review the normalized population
Verify the normalized population is displayed
Verify the processed month is ready for the next pipeline step

title: Select a workspace folder and enter the app
description: This verifies that a user can grant workspace folder access and reach the app shell with the selected workspace loaded.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the workspace folder selection control
Grant access to a workspace folder in the browser picker
Verify the app shell is displayed
Verify the selected workspace is loaded

title: Restore a workspace snapshot from the archive
description: This verifies that an admin can browse archive snapshots and restore a previous workspace backup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the archive area
Open a workspace snapshot
Restore the selected snapshot
Verify the restored workspace snapshot is visible
Verify a restore confirmation is visible

title: Approve a pending referral request
description: A supervisor or admin can review a pending referral request and approve it so the request is removed from the pending list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the approval requests section
Open the pending referral requests view
Approve a pending request
Verify the request is removed from the pending list
Verify the approval confirmation is visible

title: Unlock the app as bootstrap admin
description: This verifies that the bootstrap admin can open the hidden login flow and successfully enter the app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press the hidden keyboard shortcut to open the admin login modal
Fill in the admin passcode field with a valid passcode
Submit the admin login form
Verify the admin session is active
Verify the app shell is displayed for the administrator

title: Draw a stratified sample and save it
description: This verifies that an admin can generate a sampled population with breakdown details and persist the sample successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the stratified sample drawing flow
Enter a seed value for the draw
Draw the sample
Confirm saving the sample
Verify the sample breakdown is displayed
Verify the saved sample confirmation is visible

title: Submit a completed inspection answer
description: This verifies that a managed user can complete an inspection and submit it successfully from the assigned rows view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in with managed user credentials
Open مساحة العمل
Open صور الأشعة المحالة
Select a month
Choose an inspection template
Search the rows
Expand an assigned row
Fill in the inspection answer fields
Submit the inspection
Verify the inspection result is saved
Verify a submission confirmation is visible

title: Sign in as a managed user
description: This verifies that a managed user can enter valid credentials and open the role-filtered app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user session is active
Verify the role-filtered app shell is displayed

title: Save a distributed assignment to employees
description: This verifies that an admin can assign sampled rows to employees and persist the distribution snapshot and log.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the distribution flow
Select employees and quotas for the distribution
Start the assignment
Confirm saving the distribution
Verify the assignment summary is displayed
Verify the distribution save confirmation is visible

title: Process imported population data and save the monthly output
description: This verifies that imported population data can be processed, reviewed, and saved to the workspace as monthly output files.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open إدارة بيانات الأشعة
Open the processing flow
Review the imported workbook summary
Paste or update the CertScan registry text
Start population processing
Verify processing statistics are displayed
Confirm saving the processed data to the workspace folder
Verify the monthly output has been saved

title: Re-grant workspace folder access after a fresh prompt
description: This verifies that a user can respond to a repeated workspace access prompt and return to the app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in with managed user credentials
Choose a workspace folder
Choose the same workspace folder again when prompted
Verify the app shell is visible
Verify workspace content is available again

title: Reject a pending referral request
description: A supervisor or admin can review a pending referral request and reject it so the request is removed from the pending list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the approval requests section
Open the pending referral requests view
Reject a pending request
Verify the request is removed from the pending list
Verify the rejection confirmation is visible

title: Browse backup snapshots and restore one
description: This verifies that a supervisor or admin can open the archive, inspect a backup snapshot, and restore it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Select the archive tab
Open a backup snapshot
Restore the selected snapshot
Confirm the restore
Verify the restored snapshot is active
Verify the archive view reflects the restored workspace

title: Browse assigned x-ray rows and save a draft inspection
description: This verifies that a managed user can open assigned rows, inspect details, enter answers, and save a draft.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in with managed user credentials
Open مساحة العمل
Open صور الأشعة المحالة
Select a month
Choose an inspection template
Search the rows
Expand an assigned row
Fill in the inspection answer fields
Save the inspection as a draft
Verify the expanded row details remain visible
Verify a draft confirmation is visible

title: Approve a pending replacement request
description: A supervisor or admin can review a pending replacement request and approve it so the request is resolved and the row status updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the approval requests section
Open the pending replacement requests view
Approve a pending request
Verify the request is removed from the pending list
Verify the downstream status update is visible

title: Review the workbook summary before processing population data
description: This verifies that an admin can upload a monthly workbook and inspect the workbook summary before continuing the pipeline.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data import area
Upload a valid monthly risk or BI workbook
Verify a workbook summary is displayed
Verify the imported workbook is ready for processing

title: Reject a pending replacement request
description: A supervisor or admin can review a pending replacement request and reject it so the request is resolved without changing the row assignment.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the approval requests section
Open the pending replacement requests view
Reject a pending request
Verify the request is removed from the pending list
Verify the row remains unchanged

title: Complete a reasoned replacement swap
description: An admin can select a replacement candidate, provide a reason, and confirm the swap so the distribution entry updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the x-ray referrals view
Open the replacement workflow for an eligible row
Select a replacement candidate
Fill in the reason field with a valid replacement reason
Confirm the replacement
Verify the replacement is applied
Verify the updated distribution entry is visible

title: Reopen the app with a previously granted workspace
description: This verifies that a previously chosen workspace is reused and the app opens without reselecting the folder.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the workspace folder selection control
Grant access to a workspace folder in the browser picker
Reload the page
Verify the app shell is displayed
Verify the workspace remains loaded

title: Preserve the configured sampling rules before drawing
description: This verifies that an admin can review or adjust sampling rules and proceed to a valid sample draw.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the stratified sample drawing flow
Review the current sampling rules
Adjust the sampling rules to a valid configuration
Draw the sample
Verify the sample breakdown is displayed
Verify the drawn sample is ready to save

title: Open the referral replacement workflow from an eligible row
description: An admin can open the replacement workflow from an eligible distribution row and see replacement candidates for selection.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the x-ray referrals view
Open the replacement workflow for an eligible row
Verify replacement candidates are displayed
Verify the reason field is available

title: Import a monthly risk workbook and review the parsed summary
description: This verifies that a user can upload a monthly risk workbook, optionally add BI data, and review the parsed workbook summary with row counts.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open إدارة بيانات الأشعة
Open the processing flow
Select the target month
Upload the risk Excel file
Upload the optional BI Excel file
Verify workbook parsing progress is displayed
Verify the workbook summary and row counts are displayed

title: Review the assignment summary before saving
description: This verifies that an admin can inspect the proposed employee allocation before confirming the distribution.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the distribution flow
Select employees and quotas for the distribution
Start the assignment
Verify the assignment summary is displayed
Verify the distribution can be confirmed

title: Create a template field and save it
description: This verifies that an admin can add a new form field to the inspection template and save the updated template successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Select the inspection template tab
Add a new form field
Set the field type and label
Save the template
Verify the updated template is displayed
Verify the new field is present in the template

title: Create a managed user account
description: An admin can add a new managed user with role and password and see the account appear in the user list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the user management tab
Start adding a new user
Fill in a unique username into the username field
Fill in a display name into the display name field
Select a managed user role
Fill in a password into the password field
Save the new user
Verify the new user appears in the user list
Verify the user is shown as active

title: Generate and download an Arabic report for a month
description: This verifies that a supervisor or admin can select a month, generate the report, and download the self-contained HTML report.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Select the reports tab
Select a month
Generate the report
Download the report
Verify the report content is displayed
Verify the downloaded report is available

title: Generate an Arabic HTML report for the current workspace
description: This verifies that an admin can generate a report and reach the HTML report review step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the reporting area
Generate the Arabic HTML report
Verify the generated report is displayed
Verify the report is ready for download

title: Browse read-only inspection results for a selected month
description: A managed user can select a month and review the read-only inspection results table for that month.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the inspection results view
Select a month
Verify the inspection results table is displayed
Verify the results are read-only

title: Save a template field visibility rule change
description: This verifies that an admin can change a template field visibility rule and save the new version successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Select the inspection template tab
Open an existing template version
Change a field visibility rule
Save the template
Verify a new template version is displayed
Verify the visibility rule change is present

title: Update an existing user account
description: An admin can change an existing user's status or role and see the updated account details reflected in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the user management tab
Select an existing user from the list
Change the user role or status
Save the changes
Verify the selected user remains visible in the list
Verify the updated role or status is reflected

title: Keep the generated seed when drawing a sample
description: This verifies that an admin can use the automatically generated seed and still produce a reviewable sample.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the stratified sample drawing flow
Leave the seed value unchanged
Draw the sample
Verify the sample breakdown is displayed
Verify the generated sample is ready for confirmation

title: Export the currently visible assigned rows
description: This verifies that a managed user can switch row scope and export the visible assigned rows view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in with managed user credentials
Open مساحة العمل
Open صور الأشعة المحالة
Select a month
Toggle to the assigned rows view
Search or filter the visible rows
Export the visible rows
Verify the filtered rows remain visible after export initiation
Verify the export action is available for the current view

title: Export inspection results to XLSX
description: A managed user can export the visible inspection results table to an XLSX file from the results view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the inspection results view
Select a month
Export the visible results to XLSX
Verify the export action completes
Verify the exported results confirmation is visible

title: Adjust role permissions for a tab
description: An admin can edit a role's tab permissions and see the permission change take effect in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the user management tab
Open the permission editor for a role
Change access for a tab or feature
Save the permission changes
Verify the permission matrix reflects the saved change
Verify the affected tab access state is updated

title: Preview the app as a different role and return to admin view
description: This verifies that an admin can switch role previews and the visible tabs update accordingly, then return to the admin view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Choose a different role preview from the admin toolbar
Verify the app remounts with the selected role's tabs and permissions
Return to the admin role preview
Verify the admin tabs and permissions are restored

title: View the restricted replacement candidate set
description: An admin can switch between recommended and all candidates and see the candidate list remain bounded to the supported size.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open the workspace section
Open the x-ray referrals view
Open the replacement workflow for an eligible row
Switch to the all candidates view
Verify the candidate list is displayed
Verify the candidate list remains bounded to a manageable set

title: Update a label override and see it applied
description: An admin can save a label override and immediately see the updated wording across the app shell.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the settings tab
Edit one label value in the form
Save the label changes
Verify the updated label text is visible in the settings area
Verify the same updated label text is reflected elsewhere in the app shell

title: Display the Arabic reports and archive tabs for an authorized user
description: This verifies that a supervisor or admin can reach the reporting and archive areas from the app shell after login.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify the app shell is displayed
Verify the reports and archive tabs are available

title: Reset a label override to its default value
description: An admin can restore a customized label to its default wording and see the original text return.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the settings tab
Edit a label value away from its default
Reset the label to its default value
Save the label changes
Verify the original default label text is visible
Verify the customized label text is no longer visible

title: Prevent distribution with no employee selection
description: This verifies that the distribution flow blocks saving when no employees are selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the distribution flow
Leave the employee selection empty
Attempt to start the assignment
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify no assignment summary is shown

title: Reject an invalid workbook before import processing
description: This verifies that the import flow surfaces a validation error when the uploaded workbook cannot be accepted.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data import area
Upload an invalid monthly workbook
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the workbook summary is not displayed

title: Reject an incorrect bootstrap admin passcode
description: This verifies that an incorrect admin passcode is not accepted and the user stays at the login step.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press the hidden keyboard shortcut to open the admin login modal
Fill in the admin passcode field with an invalid passcode
Submit the admin login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the admin session is not active

title: Reject an invalid sampling configuration
description: This verifies that an admin is prevented from drawing a sample when the sampling rules are invalid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in as the bootstrap admin with valid credentials
Open the data management area
Open the stratified sample drawing flow
Adjust the sampling rules to an invalid configuration
Attempt to draw the sample
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the sample is not prepared for saving

title: Reject an invalid login attempt
description: This verifies that the login form blocks access when incorrect credentials are entered and keeps the user on the sign-in screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in an invalid username into the username field
Fill in an invalid password into the password field
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the app shell is not displayed

title: Return no results when searching assigned rows
description: This verifies that the employee workspace shows an empty state when a search term matches no assigned rows.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Log in with managed user credentials
Open مساحة العمل
Open صور الأشعة المحالة
Select a month
Choose an inspection template
Search for a value that does not match any row
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify no assigned rows are displayed

title: Reject an incorrect managed user password
description: This verifies that a managed user cannot sign in with an invalid password and remains blocked at the login form.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the login form
Verify a login error is visible
Verify the app shell is not displayed
